name: what-the-discogs
description: Identify vinyl record pressings using the Discogs database
long_description: Identify the exact Discogs pressing of a vinyl record. Searches by artist and album, retrieves all known pressings with country, year, label and catalogue number, fetches full pressing details including matrix/runout etchings and barcode identifiers, and can add confirmed records to your Discogs collection. Drop a photo of the label or dead wax, or just describe what you have.

prompts.name: identify_vinyl
prompts.description: Identify the exact Discogs pressing of a vinyl record via guided Q&A. Optionally pass a hint (artist, album, matrix etchings, etc.) to skip known questions.

tools.name: search_masters
tools.description: Search Discogs for master releases matching an artist and album name. Returns a list of masters (id, title, year, url). Use this first when identifying a record.

tools.name: search_releases
tools.description: Search Discogs for individual releases. Use as a fallback when search_masters returns no results.

tools.name: search_by_matrix
tools.description: Search Discogs for releases by matrix/runout etching string. Use when the user can read matrix markings from the dead wax — this can identify the exact pressing in one step.

tools.name: get_versions
tools.description: Get all known pressings and versions of a master release. Returns country, year, label, catalogue number, and format for each. Accepts optional country/year/format filters.

tools.name: get_release
tools.description: Get full detail for a specific release, including matrix/runout etchings, barcodes, pressing plant, and cover art.

tools.name: get_identity
tools.description: Get the Discogs username for the authenticated token.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List the user's Discogs collection folders.

tools.name: add_to_collection
tools.description: Add an identified release to the user's Discogs collection.

discogs_token.title: Discogs API Token
discogs_token.description: Personal access token from discogs.com/settings/developers. Required to access the Discogs API.
